code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut a = 0
  while a < nums.len()
    let cur = match nums.get(a)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut j = 0
    while j < sorted.len()
      let v = match sorted.get(j)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if not inserted and cur <= v
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, cur)
        inserted = true
      end
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, cur)
    end
    sorted = new_sorted
    a = a + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < sorted.len()
    let v = match sorted.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
